backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (login overlay, auth state management, logout button) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each utility, component, hook, and store.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for both light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the InsightIQ React app that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application shell that composes the Sidebar, section routing, top bar, CSV upload dialog, and injects the LoginOverlay as an additive authentication layer using the useAuth hook.
frontend/src/components/AICopilotPanel.t: Chat-based AI copilot panel that processes natural language queries against the loaded dataset and renders text responses alongside optional dynamic charts.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Correl: Displays a Pearson correlation matrix as a color-coded HTML table for all numeric columns in the loaded dataset. Colors range from indigo (positive) to rose (negative) based on correlation value.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Outlie: Shows an IQR-based outlier detection summary table for each numeric column, including Q1, Q3, bounds, and outlier count. Displays a badge indicating total outliers found or a clean-data message.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Statis: Renders a descriptive statistics table (count, mean, median, min, max, std dev, variance, nulls) for all numeric columns in the dataset. Pulls data from the store and computes stats via a utility function.
frontend/src/components/charts/ChartCont: Provides UI controls for selecting chart type (bar, line, scatter, pie, histogram) and X/Y axis columns. Emits config changes via a callback prop.
frontend/src/components/charts/DynamicCh: Renders a Recharts chart (bar, line, scatter, pie, or histogram) based on the provided ChartConfig and cleaned dataset. Includes a custom dark-mode tooltip and a styled color palette.
frontend/src/components/CsvUpload.tsx: CSV upload component supporting drag-and-drop or file picker input, with sample data loading, parsing, column type detection, data cleaning, and store population.
frontend/src/components/DataPreviewTable: Renders a paginated, searchable, and sortable table of the cleaned dataset using data from the global store. Supports ascending/descending column sorting and row filtering via a search input.
frontend/src/components/InsightsPanel.ts: Displays AI-generated insights grouped by category, each styled by severity (high/medium/low) with corresponding icons and colors. Reads cleaned data and columns from the store and uses a utility function to generate insights.
frontend/src/components/KpiDashboard.tsx: Shows a KPI grid with total rows, columns, missing values, and outlier counts derived from the data store, followed by a column overview listing each column's name and detected type.
frontend/src/components/LoginOverlay.tsx: Renders a full-screen modal login form with email and password fields that simulates async authentication and calls an onLoginSuccess callback on success.
frontend/src/components/PredictiveModelP: Provides a UI to run linear regression between a user-selected predictor (numeric or date) and target column, displaying slope, intercept, R², data points, and trend direction after execution.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Renders the collapsible navigation sidebar with links to all app sections, a PDF export button, and a logout option. Uses Lucide icons and reads data state to conditionally enable export.
frontend/src/data/sampleDataset.ts: Exports a hardcoded sample CSV string containing 90+ rows of sales data with columns for date, product, category, revenue, units sold, region, and customer rating across Jan–Mar 2024.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Simple mock authentication hook that stores a session token in localStorage, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed since all data processing is client-side; exports nothing.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Hook that manages light/dark theme state, persisting the preference to localStorage and toggling the 'dark' class on the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, chart palette, and sidebar variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/store/dataStore.ts: Zustand store that holds the current dataset state including filename, raw and cleaned data rows, column metadata, and cleaning summary, with setDataset and clearDataset actions.
frontend/src/utils/aiCopilotEngine.ts: AI copilot engine that interprets natural language queries about a dataset, supporting filter, comparison, and chart generation by parsing query patterns and delegating to statistics, correlation, outlier, and chart utilities.
frontend/src/utils/chartSelector.ts: Selects an appropriate chart type and axis columns based on column metadata and optional user preferences, then prepares/transforms row data into a format ready for rendering (including histogram binning and pie aggregation).
frontend/src/utils/columnTypeDetector.ts: Detects whether each CSV column is numeric, categorical, or date by sampling up to 100 values and applying regex patterns and numeric parsing heuristics.
frontend/src/utils/correlationEngine.ts: Computes Pearson correlation between two numeric arrays and builds a full pairwise correlation matrix for a set of numeric columns in a dataset.
frontend/src/utils/csvParser.ts: Parses a CSV string (handling BOM, quoted fields, and escaped quotes) into an array of header-keyed row objects.
frontend/src/utils/dataCleanser.ts: Cleans raw CSV rows by imputing missing numeric values with column means, filling missing categoricals with 'N/A', and returning a cleaning summary with counts of imputed cells.
frontend/src/utils/insightsGenerator.ts: Generates a list of human-readable insights (dataset overview, top correlation, outlier champion, trends, dominant categories) by orchestrating the correlation, outlier, and regression utility modules.
frontend/src/utils/mlEngine.ts: Implements client-side linear regression and logistic regression from scratch (including matrix operations, gradient descent, and feature normalization) to produce model metrics, feature importances, predictions, and confusion matrices.
frontend/src/utils/outlierDetector.ts: Detects outliers in numeric columns using the IQR method (1.5× IQR fence) and returns per-column statistics including quartiles, bounds, and outlier values.
frontend/src/utils/pdfExporter.ts: Generates a PDF report by pulling data from the store, computing stats/outliers/correlations/insights, and rendering inline SVG bar/line charts that are embedded into the exported document.
frontend/src/utils/regressionEngine.ts: Provides linear regression calculation and a trend detection utility that fits a line to time-series data for each numeric column, returning slope, direction, and R-squared values.
frontend/src/utils/statisticsEngine.ts: Computes descriptive statistics (mean, median, min, max, stdDev, variance, count, nullCount) for individual value arrays and for all numeric columns in a dataset.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (using CSS variables and oklch), fonts, border radii, box shadows, and animations; includes animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the InsightIQ project's current state, including implemented features (full-screen login overlay, localStorage auth, logout button) and pending feature requests, with architectural notes about the auth approach.
